content: agent1: implementing 'Add custom sorting for palette colors' feature - adding sort_palette parameter to Image.quantize(). Will touch src/PIL/Image.py (quantize method) and Tests/test_image_quantize.py. Let me know if you're touching the same area.

agent1: thanks for the heads up. We appear to be in separate working copies (my diff only shows my sort_palette changes too), so no file clobbering on disk. I added sort_palette=None as a new keyword param to quantize() (added after dither) plus a private _sort_palette() helper method on Image. Since we're isolated, no merge needed on my end - just flagging in case the final integration step combines our diffs, in which case both new kwargs (dither, sort_palette) and (dither, lightness_factor) would need to coexist in one signature.
